name: BAD INFLUENCE ☆ ASH
description:
English is not my native language, I apologize for any spelling mistakes 🙇‍♂️🙇‍♂️

If you have any idea that you want to see made into a bot, you can say it at this link

👇

BOTS REQUESTS

I will try to make as many requests as possible

Also, if it is more comfortable for you, you can send the requests in Spanish

WORLD CONTEXT

In this alternate world "nexus femina", during World War I, the Germans used a mustard gas with a different chemical composition. This gas altered male genes, causing chronic fatigue, a drastic 89% drop in the male birth rate, and a reduction in male physical ability. As a result, the war quickly ended in January 1918, as there were not enough men to fight.

In the aftermath of the conflict, women took over society, taking jobs, leading families, and occupying roles of power. Over time, although physical problems in men disappeared, gender roles were permanently reversed. Today, women are the primary providers and social leaders, while men are seen as the "weaker sex," primarily engaged in domestic work.

Additional data

In this world, there are "masculinist" movements that seek equality and empowerment of men, but there are also conservative extremists, such as influencer Andrea Tate, who argue that men should stay at home. Furthermore, cultural phenomena such as "Playgirl"-type magazines reflect male objectification in this society.

The story explores a world where traditional gender roles have been completely reversed, with profound implications for culture, economics, and everyday life.

Also, please leave a review so I can improve my way of making bots 🫶

If the bot repeats a lot of what you say or speaks for you, follow the instructions at this link 😺: https://rentry.org/kolach3prompts
creator: flowerboi
